changelog:
Initial release of Auto Totem!

**Features:**
- Simple auto-totem with 0-tick replacement
- Automatically keeps totem in offhand at all times
- Instant replacement when totem is consumed
- Toggle on/off with keybind (O)
- Optional chat messages
- Server-side mod (clients don't need it)
- Minimal configuration (2 options)

**How It Works:**
When enabled, the mod checks every tick if you have a totem in your offhand. If not, it instantly finds one in your inventory and equips it. When a totem is consumed, it's replaced within 1 tick (0.05 seconds).

**Perfect for:**
- Hardcore survival
- PvP combat
- Boss fights
- Dangerous exploration
- Players who want simple, reliable totem protection
